mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 300 in CPIAUCSL signals central bank inaction, eroding real returns and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate tightening monetary policy amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity valuations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where both FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL > 300.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k in PAYEMS signals robust labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS > 150000.

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment above 4% signals slack in the labor market, prompting fiscal stimulus and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE > 4%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 102.5 in INDPRO indicates expanding supply capacity, reducing inflationary pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO > 102.5.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth above 20198 in GDPC1 signals robust economic demand, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 > 20198.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts (HOUST) and real sales (RSAFS) indicate strong demand for goods and services, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where both HOUST > 1380 and RSAFS > 696000.
